title: Earnings call transcript: Marathon Digital Q4 2024 beats EPS forecasts
text: Marathon Digital Holdings Q4 2024 earnings call transcript where the company reported beating EPS forecasts. The company delivered earnings per share of $1.24, substantially exceeding the consensus estimate of a loss of $0.32 per share. Revenue reached $214.4 million, exceeding the anticipated $180.74 million. The quarterly EPS of $1.24 represented a 487.50% earnings surprise. Revenue increased 37% to $214.4 million in Q4 2024 from $156.8 million in Q4 2023. For full year 2024, revenues grew 69% to $656.4 million from $387.5 million in 2023. The company achieved strong operational efficiency with a direct energy cost of $28.8K per bitcoin from owned mining sites. Shareholders benefited from a bitcoin yield of 62.9% per share for the full year 2024.
